Market Overview

Brands

RYBREVANT (amivantamab)

  • Mechanism: Bispecific antibody (EGFR x MET)
  • Indications: 2L+ exon 20 EGFR NSCLC, 1L exon 20 + chemo, 1L common EGFR + lazertinib, 2L common EGFR + chemo
  • Key Competitors: TAGRISSO (osimertinib, AstraZeneca)
  • Key Trials: MARIPOSA, PAPILLON, CHRYSALIS, MARIPOSA-2, COCOON
